title: Interfacing biology, category theory and mathematical statistics
author_string: Dominique Pastor, Erwan Beurier, Andrée Ehresmann, Roger Waldeck
abstract: Motivated by the concept of degeneracy in biology (Edelman, Gally 2001), we establish a first connection between the Multiplicity Principle (Ehresmann, Vanbremeersch 2007) and mathematical statistics. Specifically, we exhibit two families of statistical tests that satisfy this principle to achieve the detection of a signal in noise.
